titles.en: Reward of reciting Laa ilaaha illallaahu h’aqqan h’aqqan

text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ سَلَمَهَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی الْأَرْمَنِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عِمْرَانَ الْخَرَّاطِ عَنْ بِشْرٍ الْأَوْزَاعِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَالَ فِی کُلِّ یَوْمٍ خَمْسَ عَشْرَهَ مَرَّهً لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ حَقّاً حَقّاً لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ إِیمَاناً وَ تَصْدِیقاً لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ عُبُودِیَّهً وَ رِقّاً أَقْبَلَ اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِ بِوَجْهِهِ فَلَمْ یَصْرِفْ عَنْهُ وَجْهَهُ حَتَّی یَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّهَ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Salamah b. al-Khattab from Muhammad b. Isa al-Armani from Abi ’Imran al-Kharrat from Bishr al-Awzaa’i from Ja’far b. Muhammad from his father from his forefathers (a.s.) who said: “Whoever says fifteen times every day, 'Laa ilaaha illallaahu haqqan haqqan, Laa ilaaha illallaahu eemaanan wa tasdeeqan, Laa ilaaha illallaahu 'uboodiyyatan wa riqan' (There is no god but Allah, truly, truly. There is no god but Allah, in belief and affirmation. There is no god but Allah, in servitude and submission), the Almighty Allah will turn towards him and won’t turn back from his face till he enters Paradise.”
